text: In the first image, I see myself separated from others by glass—a quiet observer at the threshold, autumnal in my detachment and reflection. In the second image, light leaks through my fingers, almost hesitant to fully grasp the present. Spring’s energy hums ahead, vivid and restless, while I linger in this in-between, wistful for what is gone, expectant for what may come. I feel both distant and alive, like a season on the cusp.
